name: Warm Brown Rice Salad (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup uncooked long grain brown rice
3 tablespoons rice or champagne vinegar (up to 4)
1/4 cup chopped flat leaf parsley leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the salted water to a boil.
2. Add the brown rice, cover, and cook over very low heat for 30 minutes.
3. Check the brown rice; if not tender, cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Drain the rice and spread it out in a shallow bowl to cool slightly.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine the vegetable oil, olive oil, vinegar, mustard, salt, and pepper, seasoning to taste.
6. When the chicken is done, combine the cooled rice, peas, basil, and parsley.
7. Adjust the seasoning as needed.
Yield: 4 servings
Busted by Gail Shermeyer  on May 24, 1997
